ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2017 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Robert R. Cross, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff. There being no appearance by the Plaintiff the Court ordered case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608 (b). Judge: Newton Lam; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2017 Continued To Oct-24-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to October 24, 2017 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: James Robertson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-01-2017 Continued To Apr-18-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Self-Represented Plaintiff is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear the OSC is re-set to April 18, 2017 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)
